toolArgs.claimed_quote: Crumbs regulates R8 cell fate through its FERM-binding motif. Confocal microscope images of adult D. melanogaster retinas stained with anti-GFP (grey), anti-Rh5 (magenta) and anti-Rh6 (green) antibodies. GFP-negative clones harboured the following alleles: crb 11A22 (A), FRT82B (negative control) (B) or crb Δ FBM. HA (C). Panel (A) is a maximum projection as rhodopsins localised to different focal planes in wild type and mutant clones. Scale bars are 20μm.
